title: hieracium dollineri subsp. tridentinum
intro: Hieracium dollineri subsp. tridentinum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are thought to be attributed to its flavonoid and terpenoid content. The health benefits of Hieracium dollineri subsp. tridentinum include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support digestive health, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
